title: Separate Donaldson scripture quotation from actual commentary at the corpus/build layer so Donaldson stops echoing the verse text back as commentary
Upgrade result/morsel navigation to be paragraph-first across available source corpora
Add an append-only immutable task ledger and worker-ready orchestration format
Split source periodicals and large historical corpora into natural paragraph-addressed browse units so every result can open its full parent document at the relevant paragraph
Replace heuristic source-doc resolution with stable doc and paragraph IDs in the scripture-side word/graph artifacts so cross-corpus jumps stay exact after future corpus changes

Rebuild scripture-side critical-word coverage so semantically rich verse terms like loved, breath, life, and soul surface deeper paragraph-level links instead of disappearing from the interactive graph
Add non-Bible word-study fallbacks for Book of Mormon, Doctrine and Covenants, and Pearl of Great Price so clicked words there still surface translation/gloss context without Strong's data
Add mobile quick-back and cross-corpus regression coverage so swipe-back and history restoration are tested the same way traversal is tested
